metadata.title: animal.ia — Pet Insurance & Health
metadata.description: Manage your pet's insurance, medical records, and documents all in one place.

hero.title: Everything for your pet, in one app
hero.subtitle: Insurance, medical records, documents, and AI assistance — everything you need to take care of your pet.

features.title: What you can do with animal.ia
features.subtitle: A complete platform for your pet's health and protection.

insurance.title: Pet Insurance
insurance.description: Choose the perfect plan to protect your pet. Instant quotes and comprehensive coverage.

records.title: Medical Records
records.description: Keep track of visits, vaccines, treatments, and medications in a clear, organized timeline.

claims.title: Claims Filing
claims.description: File a claim in minutes. Upload invoices and track the status in real time.

chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.description: Got a question? Our AI chatbot answers 24/7 about coverage, claims, and much more.

documents.title: Document Archive
documents.description: Passport, vaccination booklet, microchip — all your pet's documents safe in the cloud.

onboarding.title: Easy Sign Up
onboarding.description: Register yourself and your pet in just a few steps. No paperwork, just simplicity.

pricing.title: Choose the Perfect Plan
pricing.subtitle: Flexible plans for every need. Start protecting your pet today.

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: The most popular choice for pet lovers

step3.title: Pet health
step3.subtitle: A few questions about your pet's health

step4.title: Choose your plan
step4.subtitle: Select the ideal coverage for your pet

complete.title: Welcome to animal.ia!
complete.subtitle: Your account has been created successfully. You're ready to protect your pet.
